eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Georgia; at 10:32 AM ON FEB 26, 2026 Effective until 04:32 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: We interrupt this program to bring you this important announcement. This is an emergency missing child alert, or Levis Call, the Georgia version of an Amber Alert. The Barrow County Sheriffs Office and the GEORGIA BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION are looking for a 2020 Toyota Camery, red in color Georgia tag unknown. On February 26, 2026, Rafael Aguilar Rubio, a 1year old Hispanic male with black hair and brown eyes and was last seen wearing long monkey style pajamas and brown socks. He was abducted by Cezar N. Martinez, a 20 year old Hispanic male, 5 foot 10 inches, weighing 200 pounds, with black hair and brown eyes and was last seen wearing tee shirt, black adidas slides and a shorts. They were last seen at 681 Carla Court winder, GA West toward Gwinnett County. Rafael Aguilar Rubio is believed to be in extreme danger. If you have any information on the whereabouts of Rafael Aguilar Rubio or the 2020 Toyota Camery, red in color Georgia tag unknown., please dial 911. The public can also provide information to the GBI tip line at 1-800-597-TIPS or the See Send app for smartphone users.
